columns.name: ActorName
columns.description: User principal name or email address.

columns.name: ActorUserId
columns.description: Internal user key or GUID.

columns.name: ActorUserType
columns.description: Type of user (e.g., Regular, Admin, System).

columns.name: AgentId
columns.description: The version number or version ID of the agent involved.

columns.name: AgentName
columns.description: A friendly readable name of the agent.

columns.name: AIModelName
columns.description: Name of the AI model used (for extensibility).

columns.name: AIModelVersion
columns.description: Version of the AI model used.

columns.name: AppHost
columns.description: Application that hosts copilot.

columns.name: AppIdentity
columns.description: Identity of the application hosting the copilot interaction.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: ClientRegion
columns.description: Region of the client.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: LLMEventData
columns.description: Parsed LLM event data (for copilot different RecordTypes).

columns.name: LogVersion
columns.description: Version of the LLM log format.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: Organization GUID.

columns.name: RecordId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the audit record.

columns.name: RecordType
columns.description: Normalized record type name (e.g., CopilotInteraction, UpdateCopilotSettings).

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SrcIpAddr
columns.description: IP address of the client.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Timestamp of the audit event.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: Version
columns.description: Version of the audit schema or event.

columns.name: Workload
columns.description: The workload or product (e.g., Copilot, AzureOpenAI).
